title: Pre-Peru packing list — Aug 2021
html:
TL;DR

  • Apple Note from Aug 21, 2021 (Yahir age 18) — bare packing checklist titled "-passport". Sits one week ahead of his Peru departure and ten days before the "seize the day" Machu Picchu prep note. The list itself is the artifact: phone, laptop is conspicuously absent, Nintendo Switch, "5x pants / 5x" (shirts implied), AirPods + wired headphones, contact-solution kit, neck pillow, book, hats/beanies, glasses.
  • The dual-headphones detail is on-brand for Yahir's traveling kit — wired backup as a contingency for a multi-leg flight to Lima where AirPods can die mid-route. Same risk-redundancy logic that shows up in the Traditional Legitimate vs Scrappy fare math from the May 2021 budget note (raw: 2021 05 20 scrappy flight 400 round trip).
  • Brings the Switch to a working trip — first hint that Yahir at 18 still defaults to a leisure device alongside study materials, before the later no runway discipline era strips that out.
  • No food, no documents besides the title, no contacts, no money plan. The 2021 08 31 seize the day follow-up will fill in tickets + currency exchange + poncho/beanie. Read these two notes as a single distributed checklist.
  • Wardrobe ratio (5x pants : 5x shirts) implies a ~1-week rotation cycle — consistent with the CIEE-style short trip mode rather than a semester-abroad load-out.

Key fragments

"-passport / -phone / -Nintendo switch / -backpack"
"5x pants / 5x"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Concrete primary source for the peru prep 2021 cluster — until now the cluster was driven by retrospective references; this is the moment Yahir actually packs.
  • Pairs with 2021 08 31 seize the day and the COVID test logistics note to triangulate the exact pre-flight week.

Privacy

  • No PII in the source — pure checklist.

Wikilinks
